# qlik_app (Resource)

Manages a Qlik Cloud application.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "qlik_app" "tf-tests" {
  name        = "Some Name"
  description = "This is the description of an app"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name (title) of the app.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the app.
- `space_id` (String) The space ID the app belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `created_date` (String) The date and time (RFC3339) when the app was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the app.
- `locale` (String) The locale setting of the app.
- `modified_date` (String) The date and time (RFC3339) when the app was last modified.
- `owner_id` (String) The identifier of the app owner.
- `publish_time` (String) The date and time (RFC3339) when the app was published, empty if unpublished.
- `published` (Boolean) Whether the app has been published.
- `thumbnail` (String) App thumbnail URL.
